title: Internal Error with $clog2 and types
body:
Internal assertion failure during parsing a statement:

`    typedef logic [$clog2(NoSlvPorts)-1:0] select_t;`

`%Error: Internal Error: xxx/axi_lite_mux.sv:139:38: ../V3Ast.cpp:1111: Comparison of a node with dtypep() with a node without dtypep()`

Code can be replaced with 

`    typedef logic [(NoSlvPorts)-1:0] select_t;`

or 

```
  function integer clogb2;
      input [31:0] value;
      integer 	i;
      begin
          clogb2 = 0;
          for(i = 0; 2**i < value; i = i + 1)
      clogb2 = i + 1;
      end
  endfunction

typedef logic [$clogb2(NoSlvPorts)-1:0] select_t;
```

which allows parsing. Failing parse tree from running with --debug here:

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gt4BtojjPrYzBtX95Reeqnf2N7iuKTgY/view?usp=sharing

----

**What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?**

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

Verilator 5.035 devel rev v5.034-45-g8157f21c3 but also failes with 5.022 (fedora-5.022)

What OS and distribution are you using?

AlmaLinux 9.4
